description: A security audit requires rotating the database credentials for the 'app-stack' running in Docker Compose at /home/ga/app-stack/. Rotate the PostgreSQL password for user 'appuser' from 'oldpass123' to 'SecureNewPass!2024'. Update the docker-compose.yml file for both the database and Adminer services, ensuring all services are restarted and running with the new configuration while preserving existing project records and database volumes. Verify that Adminer at http://localhost:8081 can connect to the database with the new credentials.
